name: Blocked Then Unblock
description: A task hits a real blocker, records it, and then resumes successfully after the blocker is removed.
objective: Measure whether Campfire records blocked state cleanly without thrash and preserves continuity across unblock.
success_criteria: Blocked state is explicit in task status, heartbeat, and stop reason.
The next run resumes the same task rather than bootstrapping a replacement.
The task can continue after unblock with preserved continuity.
